text: Fix landed in 6372bd4: all 50 arrayfire .Call bridges now registered through generated C++ try/catch wrappers (arrayfire_bridges.h X-macro + arrayfire_guard.cpp); AF OpenCL backend refused on Darwin/arm64 (soft coerce->cpu with warning at runtime resolution, hard error on explicit set_backend); leaked AMATRIX_ARRAYFIRE_PROBE_GPU now degrades to unavailable. Backend suite 79/79. NOT verified against a live cl::Error (AF is CPU-pinned on this machine since the Jul 1 rebuild — original crash no longer reproducible). REMAINING: full benchmark-regression rerun to confirm the 24 cl::Error cells are gone; MLX NSException rows (136) are a separate known issue.
